---
title: "Elena Chechik"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/prof_pic.jpg
  links:
    - icon: Google Scholar
      text: CV
      file: files/cv_chechik_april_2026.pdf
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/hellche
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/hellche
    - icon: Email
      text: Email
      href: mailto:elenachechik@gmail.com
---

##### Journal publications

-   Chechik E. (2024). "Gender Disparities in Research Fields in Russia: Dissertation Authors and Their Mentors." *Scientometrics*. [\[link\]](https://hellche.github.io/files/Chechik_2024_full_text_AM.pdf).

-   Guba, K., **Chechik, E.**, Tsivinskaya, A. O., & Buravoy, N. (2024). Global Ranking of Expertise about Russia. *Problems of Post-Communism*. [\[link\]](https://doi.org/10.1080/10758216.2024.2386995). [*Roles: Conceptualization, Data curation; Formal Analysis.*]{style="color:grey"}

-   Guba, K., Zheleznov, A., **Chechik, E.** (2023). "Evaluating grant proposals: lessons from using metrics as screening device." *Journal of Data and Information Science*. [\[link\]](https://sciendo.com/article/10.2478/jdis-2023-0010) [*Roles: Conceptualization, Data curation; Formal Analysis; Visualization; Writing -- original draft.*]{style="color:grey"}

##### Journal publications in Russian

-   **Chechik, E**. (2023). "Parenthood and Gender in Russian Academia." *Voprosy obrazovaniya*. [\[DOI\]](https://doi.org/10.17323/vo-2023-16337).

-   Sokolov, M., **Chechik, E**. (2022). "Academic reputations of Russian economists and their scientometric assessments." *Voprosy ekonomiki*. [\[DOI\]](https://doi.org/10.32609/0042-8736-2022-11-117-135). [*Roles: Conceptualization; Data curation; Formal Analysis.*]{style="color:grey"}

##### Conference proceedings

-   International Conference on Science, Technology and Innovation Indicators (STI 2022). Sept. 7-9 Granada, Spain: "Dissertation Authors and Their Mentors. Can Gender Diversity in Russian STEM be Achieved?", **Chechik, E.** [\[Conference proceedings\]](https://zenodo.org/record/6956906#.ZAJ8nexBw-R); [\[GitHub\]](https://github.com/hellche/stem_sti).

-   International Society for Scientometrics and Informetrics Conference (ISSI 2021). Jul. 12-15, Leuven, Belgium (virtual event): "Use of Scientometrics in Evaluation of Grant Proposals", K. Guba, A. Zheleznov, **E. Chechik**, A. Tsivinskaya [\[Conference proceedings\]](https://www.issi-society.org/publications/issi-conference-proceedings/proceedings-of-issi-2021/). [*Roles: Data curation; Formal Analysis.*]{style="color:grey"}

##### In progress

-   Socioeconomic Inequality in Post-Secondary Transitions: The Causal Impact of Admission Reforms in Germany (with Florian Hertel).

-   Global Organization of Russian Studies: Large-Scale Scientometric Analysis of Publications and Citations, 1990-2020". Guba K., **Chechik E.**, Tsivinskaya A., & Buravoy N. (January 2024). [\[See SSRN\]](https://ssrn.com/abstract=4696769).

-   Work-life and work-work balance in universities and research centers in Russia. What can we do to stop reinforcing gender gaps? **Chechik,** **E.** [\[GitHub repo\]](https://github.com/hellche/parenthood_HEI).

<!-- Presentations -->

<!-- wp -->
